solutions.solution: The main figure get inverted, the arrow inside the figure rotates 90° anti-clockwise, the dot at the bottom positions interchange places and two black dots are added at the top position.
From problem figure (1) to (2) all the symbols interchange positions as shown in the diagram and a new symbol appears in place of symbol marked by *.
From problem figure (1) to (2), line segments attached to both sides (left and right) of the figure are deleted and circles inside the figure come outside the figure.

From problem figure (1) to (2), the main figure rotates 180° and a new figure with one less number of sides than the pre-existing figure appears inside it. Figure (4) should be replaced by answer figure (c).
